title: Modded Lore SMP
description: A Modpack that was made for the uses of the Members of The Lore SMP an SMP for me and my friends, and for anyone who wants to use this Modpack really. Including mods like Better End, Impaled and Origins it makes a very cool experience for playing Modded.
body:
A Modpack originally made for the Modded Lore SMP (You will not find it on YouTube so Don't Try). Now I share it worldwide for people to try, it is a very fun modpack, including mods such as: Better End, Apple Skin, Impaled, Origins, Simple Voice Chat, and Sodium. It adds a fun and new way to play Modded Minecraft, me and the members of the SMP have had a really fun time with this Modpack and I hope you all will too! - Lore SMP Team
